description: Choreo is WSO2’s cloud internal developer platform for building, deploying, securing, and managing cloud-native applications and APIs. It also supports publishing developer-facing APIs and deploying MCP servers on the platform.
summary: choreo.dev exposes a developer login portal plus a documented `choreo` CLI for managing Choreo resources; public docs also describe hosted REST APIs, GraphQL endpoints, and MCP servers that customers publish on Choreo, but no single first-party machine-readable control-plane API or public MCP connect endpoint for choreo.dev itself was identified.
